thm:1.summary: Quantitative liminf: $\liminf_n (p_{n+1} - p_n) / [\sqrt{\log p_n}\,(\log_2 p_n)^2] < \infty$. Sharpens GPY I's qualitative $E_1 = 0$ to an explicit decay rate.

thm:2.summary: Conditional version: under hypothetical zero-free region for $L(s,\chi)$ at primitive real characters with $q \le \exp(3\sqrt{\log N})$, an admissible $h$-tuple $\mathcal{A} = \{a_i\}$ with $h \ge C \sqrt{\log N}\,\log_2^2 N$ captures small gaps. The key 'modulo Siegel zero' framework.

thm:3.summary: $(\mathcal{P} - \mathcal{P}) \cap (\mathcal{A} - \mathcal{A})$ is infinite for any sufficiently dense set $\mathcal{A} \subset \mathbb{N}$ with $|\mathcal{A} \cap [1,N]| \gg \sqrt{\log N}\,\log_2^2 N$ for $N \ge N_0$. Strong density-of-prime-differences statement.

thm:4.summary: $\mathcal{A}$-restricted $\Lambda_R$-correlation asymptotic: $\sum_{n \in \mathcal{A}(\mathcal{H}_1) \cap \mathcal{A}(\mathcal{H}_2)} \Lambda_R(n;\mathcal{H}_1,\ell_1)\,\Lambda_R(n;\mathcal{H}_2,\ell_2) = N \cdot \binom{\ell_1+\ell_2}{\ell_1} \frac{(\log R)^{r+\ell_1+\ell_2}}{(r+\ell_1+\ell_2)!} \cdot \frac{\mathfrak{S}(\mathcal{H})\,P}{|\mathcal{A}(\mathcal{H})|} \cdot (1 + O(\cdot))$. The $S_1$ calculation, generalized to a set $\mathcal{A}$.

thm:5.summary: $\mathcal{A}$-restricted $\Lambda_R$-correlation with prime indicator (the $S_2$ analog). Together with thm:4 evaluates $S_2 - \rho S_1$ over a restricted domain.

thm:6.summary: Approximate orthogonality / equidistribution for primes in arithmetic progressions to small moduli, used to translate GPY's argument into the $\mathcal{A}$-restricted setting.

lem:1.summary: Contour integral bound for $\int_{\mathcal{L}} (\log(|s|+3))^B |R^s/s^k\,ds|$. Same role as math/0508185:lem:1, refined for the $\mathcal{A}$-restricted case.

lem:2.summary: Divisor sum bounds $\sum d_m(q)/q \ll (m+\log x)^{m+1}$. Standard analytic workhorse.

lem:3.summary: Perturbed $\mathcal{T}^*_R$ asymptotic — analytic core of thm:4, thm:5. Refines math/0508185:lem:3 to handle restriction to $\mathcal{A}$.

lem:4.summary: Singular-series factorization for primes restricted to a set $\mathcal{A}$. Replaces standard $\mathfrak{S}(\mathcal{H})$ with $\mathcal{A}$-twisted version.

lem:5.summary: Counting lemma for $\mathcal{A} \cap$ residue-class intersections, used in evaluating the $S_1$ sum.

lem:6.summary: Conditional Bombieri-Vinogradov-style estimate compatible with the assumption of thm:2.

edges.note: Conditional thm:2 plus zero-free-region elimination yields unconditional thm:1.
Both quantify the small-gaps phenomenon — thm:1 for primes, thm:3 for prime-difference / general-set differences.

main_results.description: thm:1 (quantitative $\sqrt{\log p_n}$ liminf), thm:2 (conditional version under zero-free region), thm:3 ($\mathcal{P}-\mathcal{P}$ density in $\mathcal{A}-\mathcal{A}$).

A_restricted_correlation_engine.description: thm:4 ($S_1$ over $\mathcal{A}$), thm:5 ($S_2$ over $\mathcal{A}$), thm:6 (AP equidistribution). The set-restricted analogs of GPY I's prop:1, prop:2.

analytic_machinery.description: lem:1 (contour), lem:2 (divisor moments), lem:3 ($\mathcal{T}^*_R$ asymptotic), lem:4 (singular series), lem:5 (set counting), lem:6 (conditional BV).

GPY:I.title: Primes in Tuples I
GPY:I.role: direct_predecessor — quantitative refinement of GPY I

ElliottHalberstam:1970.title: A conjecture in prime number theory
